title: JTE (Just the Essentials)
description: An all-in-one utility plugin offering fast admin commands like warps, spawn, broadcast, gmc, gms, gmsp, gma, fly, and announcers. Continuously updated with new features to make server management easier than ever.
body:
# JTE — Just The Essentials

JTE is a lightweight, modern utility plugin built to provide server admins with the essential tools they actually need. No unnecessary extras — just a clean, fast, and reliable set of features that keep server management simple. With quick gamemode commands, a smooth fly toggle, announcements, chat formatting, and full PlaceholderAPI support, JTE delivers a streamlined experience that stays true to its name. More features and improvements are actively being developed.

## Features
- Quick gamemode commands: **/gmc**, **/gms**, **/gma**, **/gmsp**
- Simple **/fly** toggle for staff mobility
- Administration /broadcast command
- First Join Message & Rewards!
- Lightweight announcement system for server-wide broadcasts  
- Customizable join/quit messages powered by **MiniMessage**  
- Elegant **chat format** support  
- **PlaceholderAPI** compatibility  
- Actively maintained with more essentials on the way
- Spawn & Warp System!
